name: Hungarian Goulash Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Lean Beef Chuck, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef chuck into 1-inch cubes.
2. Heat the shortening or oil in a large kettle over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté until tender. Stir in paprika and cook for 1 minute.
3. Wipe the beef cubes dry, then brown them on all sides, several at a time, until nicely colored.
4. Add tomatoes, caraway seeds, marjoram, lemon peel, water, salt, and pepper to the kettle. Mix well.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low. Cover and simmer for 45 minutes.
6. Gently stir in the potatoes (peeled and cubed) and continue cooking until they are tender, about 20 more minutes.
Serves 10.
